title: bouvardia ferruginea
intro: Bouvardia ferruginea, also known as rusty bouvardia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of bouvardia ferruginea include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, bouvardia ferruginea is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
